column1: 毎日練習すれば、上手くなって当然だ。
column2: まいにちれんしゅうすれば、うまくなってとうぜんだ。
column3: If you practice every day, it's only natural you'd improve.
column4: て当然だ (it's only natural that, as a matter of course, no wonder)
column5: Verb[て] + 当然だ / i-Adj[くて] + 当然だ
column6: expresses that a result or state is entirely expected given the circumstances; no surprise
column7: て当然だ: improvement expected from consistent practice
column8: て当然だ = expected natural outcome; のも当然だ = same (nominalizer version); のは当たり前 = it's obvious that; はずだ = should be/expected (based on logic)
